insights: Facsimile signatures dominate rejections: 3 of 14 (21%) explicitly flagged, preventing ~$0-50 junk autos from matching real signed cards.
Gold/metallic/novelty editions: 4 rejections (28%) involve gold foil, gold edition, or novelty labeling—strong signal of mass-market reprints.
Confirmed snipes are Ichiro Autos with massive positive delta (81-82% underpriced); both under $17 vs $90 market avg—target undervalued vintage/parallel autos.
Wrong player/card metadata: 4 rejections (28%) have mismatched titles, wrong card numbers, or mixed rosters—strict metadata validation needed.
Reprint/custom/incomplete inventory: 3 rejections (21%) flagged as reprint, incomplete set missing key cards, or custom variants.
Price outliers rejected: Rejections often note 'wrong market price' or price history mismatch; confirmed deals show 80%+ delta to market.
Refractor parallels require caution: 3 Ohtani Refractors rejected vs 0 confirmed; rainbow foil and reprint concerns dominate.
Real snipes have clean, specific titles and modern parallels (Topps Tribute, Authentic Images); avoid vague/novelty framing.
